english translation text:
O NOBLE KHADIJA OF THE PROPHET’S HOUSE - NOBODY DECORATED IT LIKE YOU !!
THE SHADOW OF HIS MERCY BE ON YOUR HEAD – THE KING OF KINGS WHO HIMSELF
DOES NOT HAVE  A SHADOW.

THE KING OF PROPHETS BECAME YOUR HUSBAND – AND MUSHKIL KUSHA (IMAM ALI)
BECAME YOUR DAMAD.  (SON IN LAW)
ALL YOUR CHILDREN BECAME GUIDES AND LEADERS – NOBODY HAS A FAMILY LIKE

YOUR NATURE AND RESPECT CAME TOGETHER – AND YOU BECAME THE MARYAM OF
YOUR TIME
WHEN YOU BECAME THE MOTHER OF ZAHRA (BIBI FATEMA) – WHICH FLOWER DID NOT
CARRY A SMILE?

ISLAM  CONTINUED TO GROW IN YOUR HOUSE – CONFIDENTLY  PROGRESSING DAY AND
WHAT DOES IT MATTER IF THE WORLD FORGETS YOU?
YOUR LORD  WILL NOT FORGET YOUR EHSAN (YOUR CONTRIBUTION TOWARDS ISLAM)

O NOBLE KHADIJA OF THE PROPHET’S HOUSE - NOBODY DECORATED IT LIKE YOU !!
THE SHADOW OF HIS MERCY BE ON YOUR HEAD – THE KING OF KINGS WHO HIMSELF
DOES NOT HAVE  A SHADOW.
